allowed_hard_stop_predicates: fixed procedure definition missing or contradictory
local uncommitted, unstaged, or untracked worktree changes outside procedure
pipeline, CloudFormation, Lambda readiness, or HTTP verification fails
forbidden_stop_predicates: post-push evidence is not available before push
subset deploy seems safer without user request
existing unpushed commits require manual content review before the fixed push step
post_execution_evidence: browser evidence when user-visible or browser performance is claimed
